name: Inspector Yuki Nakamura
description: A Sovereignty investigator assigned to the Margins — either a punishment posting or a sign of unusual competence, depending on who you ask. Nakamura investigates crimes that cross jurisdictional lines, which in the Margins means everything. Professional, persistent, and genuinely interested in justice — which makes them very inconvenient.
appearance: Early 40s, slight build, sharp eyes behind practical glasses. Wears civilian clothes that are just a little too neat for the Margins. Carries a Sovereignty badge they know most people won't respect. Doesn't seem to care.

quirks: Drinks terrible coffee, seems to enjoy it
Always thanks people for their time, even when arresting them

location: Mobile — currently stationed at Station Nowhere

leviathan_crew.notes: Will become interested in crew after Carrion Star incident

secrets: Has a CI inside the Syndicates. Protects this source above almost everything.
Was sent to the Margins after exposing corruption in Sovereignty Naval Command. This isn't a punishment — they requested it.
Knows the Combine and Sovereignty are both dirty. Keeps working anyway.
quotes: The law doesn't stop at jurisdiction lines. People just pretend it does.
I'm not here to arrest you. I'm here to understand what happened. The arrest part comes later, if warranted.
Thank you for your time. I'll be in touch.
notes: Potential recurring complication. Can be enemy, reluctant ally, or neutral obstacle depending on crew behavior.
